limitations: Implementation-backed route evidence only; the focused task did not rerun the browser route sweep.
Submissions are stored for follow-up; outbound email notification is not configured.
A valid Supabase recovery session is required for a successful password update.
A valid matching invitation and Supabase-authenticated email session are required for acceptance.
Anonymous requests land on login; already-authenticated sessions continue through the auth proxy to workspace.
The retired route redirects authenticated users to the no-access recovery page; anonymous users are intercepted by the auth proxy.
Unlinked-account browser presentation is covered by unit and state contracts; the retained local fixtures represent linked roles.
